goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave at 08:45' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
